title: Oracle replication lag

servicenow_seed.short_description: [TRAINING] Oracle reporting data is hours behind
servicenow_seed.description: Finance reporting data is 4 hours stale during close. Application is up, but reports show old numbers.

correct_steps: Confirm reports are stale and app is otherwise up
Escalate to DBA as P2/P1 depending business deadline
rationale: Replication lag is a database platform problem. Help desk should not close as user error.
